Title: Increases the time certain parties have to submit a notice of intent to be a party to the certification proceedings for the siting of major utility transmission facilities
Summary: Increases the time certain parties have to submit a notice of intent to be a party to the certification proceedings for the siting of major utility transmission facilities from thirty days to forty-five days.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to increasing the time certain parties have to submit a notice of intent to be a party to the certification proceedings for the siting of major utility transmission facilities
